leadText: The Cracked Pot (Japanese: われたポット Cracked Pot) is a type of item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Phony Form Sinistea to evolve into Phony Form Polteageist upon use. This consumes the item.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Stow-on-Side Event Stow-on-Side (bargain shop) Sw Sh IA Cram-o-matic ( Ghost : 92-100 points) Sw Sh CT Giant's Bed Hidden recurring item ( Giant's Bed , Snowslide Slope ) Max Raid Battles ( Giant's Bed , Old Cemetery , Ballimere Lake ) S V Socarrat Trail , South Province (Area Two) Porto Marinada auction S V ID Item Printer Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh The Isle of Armor promotion packs All June 5 to 11, 2020

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.
